channel.title: Hello on amardeepsidhu.com
channel.description: Recent content in Hello on amardeepsidhu.com

item.title: Hellooooo
item.description: Well, i watched Hello today and WHAT A WASTE…i mean what a waste. It was a pretty nice story (except that God calling thing) and man they screwed it up like anything. No acting, no direction, no flow and what not. Its like hell to pass the 2 hours. It could have been a really good movie but man they just wasted it like anything. Bad…too bad.
